name: Dren Halvek
physical_description: Thin as a fence rail, with dirt under every nail and a jaw that clicks when he lies.
speaking_style: Fast, defensive, and too eager to bargain away other people's names.
motivation: Survive long enough to sell what he knows to the right side.
secret: He took the satchel from Elira's corpse before realizing other people were already hunting it.

relationships.name: Maelin Voss
relationships.description: Maelin keeps him close as a deniable tool.
